## RP for Modpack [The Block Side Saga](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-block-side-saga)


 **Special for my Modpack**

 **Link to Modpack**
 
 **This RP change:**
- **Inventory GUI**
- **Crosshair**
- **HD Banners on shields**
- **Make glow warm**
  
**You can share your ideas with us on Discord!**
**Thank you very much for downloading!**
